children.text-hint: Who or what are you looking for?

children.text: ... or identify a caller that is not listed in you address book. But ...
... for suppressed numbers we cannot show any details.
To get information about callers, I agree that the callers' phone numbers will be transferred to the search service.
Data privacy is very important to us. Clever Dialer is being operated in Germany and is subject to the German data privacy law.
Complements alien phone numbers in your call history with names.
We also complement past calls. Just scroll thru your call history to see.
